domain: AI tooling / knowledge graph / Claude Code OS
skipReason: D8 (architecture tradeoffs) was well-covered by D1+D2 findings
topThemes: Files canonical, graph derived — universal industry consensus
Official MCP memory server inadequate for T28
Agent-native memory frameworks vs PKM tools
Synthesis operations that only graphs enable
Command interface design and anti-cramming thresholds

contradictions.description: D1a referenced KuzuDB as active; D1b found it archived October 2025
contradictions.resolution: D1b is correct — KuzuDB original is dead. D1a's recommendation applies to LadybugDB fork

contradictions.description: Multiple MCP servers claim #1 on LongMemEval/LoCoMo with incompatible results
contradictions.resolution: All are self-reported, different benchmarks. Treat all performance numbers as LOW confidence

contradictions.description: Obsidian filesystem MCP works without Obsidian running, but obsidian eval CLI headless reliability unconfirmed
contradictions.resolution: Filesystem-direct MCP path is sufficient for T28's Claude Code integration use case

contradictions.description: kuzu-memory MCP uses ryugraph fork; MemoryGraph uses LadybugDB — kuzu ecosystem is fragmented
contradictions.resolution: MemoryGraph is the cleaner LadybugDB-native MCP path

corrections.issue: Term 'Dual-Embedding Memory Bank' does not appear in MemSkill (arXiv:2602.02474)
corrections.correction: The mechanism is a single shared embedding space (one model, two input types). Not a dual-embedding architecture

recommendation.primary: SQLite + simple-graph schema + FTS5 + sqlite-vec + recursive CTEs
recommendation.mcpIntegration: AgentMemory (lowest friction, MEMORY.md compatible) or obra/knowledge-graph (strongest graph analytics, serverless)
recommendation.architecturePattern: BasicMemory architecture (files-canonical + SQLite index + FTS + vector) without adopting its AGPL codebase
recommendation.schemaBlueprint: Graphiti patterns (bi-temporal edges, three-tier hierarchy, hybrid RRF retrieval, non-destructive contradiction)

debtCandidates: Current MCP memory server is insufficient — must be replaced or augmented before T28 build begins
LadybugDB stability risk (6-month fork) if chosen as backend
Graphiti LLM API dependency if chosen for ingestion
memoryCandidates: Files canonical, graph derived — architectural constant for T28
Three-tier schema (SourceNode + KnowledgeNode + ThemeNode) with 6 edge types
Ingest != absorb (metadata registration vs semantic extraction are separate operations)
MemSkill 'dual-embedding' term does not exist — brainstorm correction needed

preBuiltActions: Verify which MCP server is currently configured as 'memory' in the project
Update brainstorm decision #9 to remove 'Dual-Embedding Memory Bank' framing
Run bootstrap test: read 10 analysis.json files, write to SQLite simple-graph schema, measure time
